title: why doesnt kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion
display_title: why doesnt kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion
wikitext:
[]: why doesn't kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion             Quote Post by renacuajo3095 » Mon Feb 13, 2023 11:59 pm i never understood why he is absent at the end of episode 26 of eva tv, and if eva tv is supposed to take place during the end of evangelion then why kaworu doesn't appear at the end or during episode 26 of eva tv?

[]: Re: why doesn't kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Feb 14, 2023 7:54 am 1. Because he's not "human." 2. Because his absence by Shinji's own hand is fundamentally why Shinji is spiralling in the first place.

[]: Re: why doesn't kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Mar 11, 2023 9:54 am Same reason the Jet Alone guy isn't there, he appeared only in one episode. at the point EoTV was made no one knew he'd be such a fan favorite/ breakout character that ppl would desire closure for. Hence his bigger role in EoE, the Manga, the Rebuilds, and all the spinoffs. Even the idea that he has Adam's soul was probably not fixed at this point - (for example his character design was originally meant to be a mix of Asuka, Rei and Shinji since they were mindprobed by angels, and his line to Rei about "taking the forms of Lillim" was only added in the DC episodes)

[]: Re: why doesn't kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Thu Mar 16, 2023 6:36 am ^^^^ That's a really interesting take. In NGE, Kaworu really seems more of an "angel-type character" (appears in one episode, starts a conflict, and is eventually defeated). As I said before, I see his character as a twist on the monster of the week formula. Like all angels, he takes on a unique form. But because he not only looks and acts like a human, but also bonds with Shinji, it raises a lot of moral and philosophical questions regard killing him. It also feels very personal for Shinji as a result. Anyway, as for his appearance, I do remember reading that he was actually modeled after Shinji, Asuka, and Rei.I also know that Anno made him a boy because Kaworu was supposed to be an "ideal" version of Shinji (someone Shinji could look up to and throw himself in)...

[]: Re: why doesn't kaworu appear in episode 26 of neon genesis evangelion             Quote Post by DTGee » Wed Apr 12, 2023 9:08 pm Because nobody knew Kaworu was going to be popular. Also, Episodes 25 & 26 don't necessarily take place during The End of Evangelion . That's just a common fan theory.
